name: stellar-mosaic-x
description: Stellar Mosaic — privacy-preserving DEX on Stellar/Soroban. Monorepo root for the TypeScript SDK, CLI, and MCP server.
comment:overrides: Pin the proving toolchain across ALL workspaces to the versions nargo 1.0.0-beta.9 / bb 0.87.0 emit. A newer @noir-lang/acvm_js cannot deserialize beta.9 ACIR, and bb proof formats differ across versions — see CLAUDE.md 'Toolchain / version pinning'.
